tasks.title: Extract _RagContext and _prepare_rag_context from _run_rag_pipeline
acceptance_criteria: _RagContext dataclass with eval_vector, adv_vector, readability_map, search_id, preset
_prepare_rag_context extracts steps 1-4 from _run_rag_pipeline
_process_one becomes standalone function accepting (card, ctx: _RagContext)
_run_rag_pipeline delegates to _prepare_rag_context + _process_one (REST endpoint unchanged)
Existing tests pass without modification

tasks.title: Apply asyncio.wait(FIRST_COMPLETED) in search_resources_stream
acceptance_criteria: search_resources_stream uses _prepare_rag_context + inline _process_one tasks
asyncio.wait(FIRST_COMPLETED) loop yields evaluation/done per-resource as each completes
evaluation/done event includes data.judgment (JudgmentResult.model_dump())
adversarial/done event emitted alongside evaluation/done per resource
Timeout cancels remaining tasks
complete event still assembles full JudgedSearchResponse with final sorting

tasks.title: Add results field to federated_search/done SSE event
acceptance_criteria: federated_search/done data includes results: [card.model_dump() for card in all_results]
Cards sorted by embedding relevance score
Payload validated with existing ResourceCard schema

tasks.title: Extend SearchStreamState type and atom initial state
acceptance_criteria: partialResults: ResourceCard[] | null added to SearchStreamState
partialJudgments: Map<string, JudgmentResult> added to SearchStreamState
INITIAL_STREAM_STATE updated with null and new Map()
START action creates fresh partialResults: null, partialJudgments: new Map()
RESET action creates fresh Maps

tasks.title: Parse federated_search/done and evaluation/done data in reducer
acceptance_criteria: federated_search/done with data.results sets partialResults as ResourceCard[]
evaluation/done with data.judgment accumulates into partialJudgments Map
Existing stages/resourceProgress/result logic unchanged
Type casting consistent with existing complete event pattern

tasks.title: Extract SearchResultsGrid component from search-page-client
acceptance_criteria: Results grid (sidebar + cards + pagination + suggested collections) extracted to SearchResultsGrid
Props: results, judgments, resourceProgress, isEvaluationPhase, presetId, searchQuery, category/pagination/bookmark state
Existing rendering behavior pixel-identical
search-page-client.tsx line count reduced

tasks.title: Add isEvaluating state to VerdictBadge
acceptance_criteria: VerdictBadge accepts isEvaluating?: boolean prop
isEvaluating=true renders blue pulse badge with 'Evaluating...' text
Verdict arrival renders badge with scale-in animation (animate-[scale-in_0.3s_ease-out])
Unevaluated state unchanged
ResourceCardRenderer threads isEvaluating prop to source-specific cards

tasks.title: Create CompactProgressBar component
acceptance_criteria: File: src/features/search/components/compact-progress-bar.tsx
Shows Bear icon + 'Evaluating resources...' + count (partialJudgments.size / 4)
Progress bar with smooth CSS transition on width
Fades out when all evaluations complete
Uses i18n keys for labels

tasks.title: Integrate progressive rendering in search-page-client
acceptance_criteria: Single displayResults = results?.results ?? stream.partialResults
Single displayJudgments = results ? judgmentByUrl : stream.partialJudgments
isEvaluationPhase = stream.isStreaming && !!stream.partialResults
ClassroomScene only when stream.isStreaming && !stream.partialResults
CompactProgressBar + SearchResultsGrid when isEvaluationPhase
SearchResultsGrid only when !stream.isStreaming && displayResults
Category sidebar counts from displayResults (not just results.counts_by_source)
Bookmark/save works with partialResults data source
Cache hit path unchanged (partialResults stays null)

tasks.title: Add i18n keys for progressive UI
acceptance_criteria: search.evaluation.evaluating key in all ARB files
search.progress.compactTitle key in all ARB files
search.progress.compactCount key with {count}/{total} interpolation in all ARB files

tasks.title: E2E verification of progressive search results
acceptance_criteria: Cards appear after federated_search/done (~3-5s from search start)
Top-4 cards show 'Evaluating...' pulse badge
Verdicts pop in individually as evaluation completes
CompactProgressBar count increments correctly
Cards 5-15 show static 'Unevaluated' badge
Cache hit renders all results instantly without progressive phase
REST fallback still works when SSE fails
Bookmark/save functional during evaluation phase
